creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad Restaurants hidden on the rooftops of private members clubs, underground past the giant tree and more, here’s the hidden restaurants you NEED to know about!

1. @yasminsoho 
2. @freshfeastrestaurant 
3. @theidler_london 

All on the @firsttableuk app so if you book at table at any of these restaurants through the app (for £4-£8), you’ll automatically get 50% off the food bill (drinks are full price)!

Sign up with code EXPLORING for £3 of free credit!

transcription.text: hidden spots in London, the hidden restaurants edition. And this time we're taking you to not one, not two, but three hidden restaurants around London that are truly hidden gems and I'll show you how to get 50% off the food at every single one. First up we're going to a Middle Eastern oasis high above the rooftops of Soho. It's actually located at the top of a private members house. Just head inside and take the lifts at the back up to the sixth floor. This is Yasmin and they do some incredible food. They're actually on the first table up which is an app that rewards you for dining off peak with 50% off all of the food. Next up we're going to a spot where you literally walk down underground past a giant olive tree to an incredible Chinese restaurant offering authentic Sichuan flavors. And what's incredible is that they have an extensive vegan menu and again they're on the first table app so you can get 50% off the food bill. It costs between four to eight pounds to book a table and if you sign up using our code EXPLORING you'll get three pounds of free credit. Finally we have a beautiful restaurant inside a hotel. This is the July in Victoria and they have a beautiful restaurant called The Idler offering a seasonal British menu inspired by Mediterranean flavors and it is so good. You'll find them on the first table app too along with hundreds of other restaurants. It's a no-brainer make sure you save this video for your next meal out.
